identity.summary: Engineer by skill. Builder by choice. I create solutions that empower people and shape communities.

timeline.title: Building products for the next generation of Sri Lanka.
timeline.desc: Building technology that shapes the future.

about.legacyQuote: Not just building products. Building a legacy.

contact.subtitle: I'm open to internships, collaborations, and weird side projects with people who care.

projects.title: ForFuture
projects.desc: A youth-powered platform for civic engagement and social impact — where ideas turn into measurable change.

story.why: I saw a gap between young people's desire to make a difference and the tools available to them.
story.problem: Youth voices are often marginalized in civic tech and community planning.
story.solution: Built a scalable platform that directly connects youth initiatives with actionable resources and community feedback.
story.next: Launching the beta program and onboarding the first 500 users.

projects.title: NusaifOS Portfolio
projects.impact: A new standard for developer portfolios
projects.desc: A premium personal developer portfolio built with modern web technologies, smooth animations, responsive design, and a clean user experience.

story.why: Standard developer portfolios felt like templates. I wanted an operating system that documented my journey.
story.problem: Most portfolios list technologies instead of telling a story about the builder's vision and capabilities.
story.solution: Engineered a highly interactive, futuristic interface focusing on typography, whitespace, and micro-interactions.
story.next: Continually expanding the capability matrix and writing mission logs.

building.text: I'm a software developer building products for the next generation of Sri Lanka. My focus is on Full-Stack Development, AI, and scalable web applications. I learn by shipping real solutions to real problems, not just reading about them.

currentFocus.title: ForFuture
currentFocus.description: A youth-powered platform for civic engagement and social impact — where ideas turn into measurable change.

builderNotes.quote: I don't just follow the path— I build the next one.

capabilities.desc: Learning and experimenting with AI technologies.
Building ForFuture and contributing to youth initiatives.

missionLogs.log: Started Software Engineering. Began building foundations in CS, software design, and systems.
Built first production applications. Shipped prototypes spanning civic-tech, AI assistants and games. Designed and programmed a maze-solving robot from scratch.
Launched ForFuture. Focusing on youth empowerment and scalable tech solutions.
Building products for millions. Creating technology that shapes the future and empowers communities globally.
